title: Yellowstone Supervolcano Erupts, Triggering Global Cascade
subtitle: Massive eruption blankets western US in ash, initiating volcanic winter worldwide

ripples.headline: US Agricultural Belt Devastated as Ash Cloud Kills Crops Across Seven States
Global Food Prices Surge 400% as US Grain Exports Collapse Overnight
Mass Migration Crisis as 15 Million Americans Flee Ash-Covered Regions

source.title: UN High Commissioner for Refugees Emergency Bulletin

ripples.headline: Global Temperatures Drop 2°C as Volcanic Ash Blocks Sunlight Worldwide
European Energy Crisis Deepens as Solar Power Generation Falls 80%
Global Supply Chains Collapse as Reduced Sunlight Cripples Manufacturing

source.title: World Trade Organization Supply Chain Analysis

ripples.headline: Local Burrito Shop Raises Prices to $23 Due to Avocado Shortage

symphony_arc.opening: A geological giant awakens beneath Yellowstone, unleashing primordial forces that will reshape civilization itself
symphony_arc.development: Cascading failures ripple across interconnected systems - agriculture, climate, energy, and human migration creating a perfect storm of global disruption
symphony_arc.climax: The volcanic winter reaches its peak, plunging the world into an era of scarcity and forcing humanity to adapt to a fundamentally altered planet
symphony_arc.resolution: In the new reality, even the most mundane aspects of daily life - from energy costs to lunch prices - bear the permanent mark of that fateful eruption
